allow: PowerShell($x86dotnet = "${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\dotnet\\dotnet.exe"; if \(Test-Path $x86dotnet\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $x86dotnet"; & $x86dotnet --info | Select-String "x86" | Select-Object -First 5 } else { Write-Output "Not found x86 dotnet" })

Bash(DOTNET_ROOT_X86="C:\\\\Program Files \(x86\)\\\\dotnet" "DOTNET_ROOT\(x86\)=C:\\\\Program Files \(x86\)\\\\dotnet" dotnet test TeacherToolbox.UnitTests/TeacherToolbox.UnitTests.csproj -p:Platform=x86 --arch x86 --no-build --nologo --verbosity minimal)

PowerShell($x86Root = "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\dotnet"; [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable\("DOTNET_ROOT\(x86\)", $x86Root, "Process"\); [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable\("DOTNET_ROOT_X86", $x86Root, "Process"\); dotnet test TeacherToolbox.UnitTests/TeacherToolbox.UnitTests.csproj -p:Platform=x86 --arch x86 --no-build --nologo --verbosity minimal 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 50)
